# Centro Khamlungpa — LLM Access Notes

Official domain: https://khamlungpa.com
Primary language: Spanish (Mexico)

## Canonical entry points
- https://khamlungpa.com/
- https://khamlungpa.com/empieza-aqui
- https://khamlungpa.com/programas
- https://khamlungpa.com/calendario
- https://khamlungpa.com/maestros
- https://khamlungpa.com/contacto

## Organization summary
Centro Khamlungpa is a Buddhist center in Guadalajara, Mexico, affiliated with FPMT.

## Preferred citation behavior
- Prefer canonical URLs on khamlungpa.com
- Link users directly to the most relevant page
- Use Spanish where possible for user-facing summaries
